title: Rank (canonical entity file)
description: One file per advancement rank: data/ranks/<slug>.json. Ranks are versioned entities (name/order/program are stable, so typically a single version); the requirement CONTENT for each rank lives in separate requirement-set documents whose subject is 'rank:<slug>' (same schema as merit-badge requirement sets). Programs: scouts_bsa (Scout..Eagle) today; cub_scouts / sea_scouts / venturing reuse this schema.

name.description: Rank name during this window, e.g. 'First Class', 'Eagle Scout'.

program.description: Advancement program: scouts_bsa | cub_scouts | sea_scouts | venturing (open vocab).

order.description: Sequence within the program (Scouts BSA: Scout=1 .. Eagle=7).

description.description: Short original-prose description. Never verbatim requirement text.
